trivia_bullets.text: Moggs are a goblin subrace originating on Rath (the artificial plane of the Tempest block, 1997). They were purpose-bred by Volrath, evincar of Rath, to serve as soldiers — engineered to be larger, more savage, and more obedient than standard goblins. They were also trained to detect artifacts by smell, a trait Volrath used to hunt down pieces of the Legacy artifact collection. [GameLore Wiki: Mogg, via WebSearch snippet; Wikipedia: Rath Cycle]
sources: GameLore Wiki: Mogg, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "There was absolutely nothing suspicious about three moggs carrying barrels of explosives — or so they told everyone who would listen." [Scryfall]. The deadpan delivery encapsulates the Mogg trait of low intelligence paired with high confidence — following orders (or bad ideas) without question.

The sacrifice ability deals 3 damage split among up to three targets — mechanically a Goblin Grenade variant that spreads rather than concentrates. Legal in Modern, Legacy, Vintage, and Commander. EDHREC rank 14591. Art by Joseph Weston. [Scryfall]
